name: bpmct
html: bpmct
css: .potato-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100%;background:#3b2a1a}.potato{position:relative;width:clamp(90px,50%,160px);height:clamp(70px,38%,120px);background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 35% 35%,#e8c97a,#c8952a 60%,#9a6b18);border-radius:55% 45% 50% 60%/45% 55% 60% 50%;box-shadow:4px 6px 18px #1a0f04,inset -6px -6px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.28);animation:wobble 2.4s ease-in-out infinite}.eye{position:absolute;width:12%;height:16%;background:#3b2000;border-radius:50%;animation:blink 3.5s ease-in-out infinite}.left-eye{top:28%;left:26%}.right-eye{top:28%;left:58%}.mouth{position:absolute;bottom:26%;left:38%;width:24%;height:10%;border-bottom:3px solid #3b2000;border-radius:0 0 50% 50%;background:transparent}.sprout{position:absolute;top:-22%;left:44%;width:12%;height:26%;background:linear-gradient(to top,#5a9e2f,#7ec83a);border-radius:50% 50% 20% 20%;animation:sway 2.4s ease-in-out infinite}.label{position:absolute;bottom:-32%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(.65rem,3.5vw,1.1rem);font-weight:700;color:#f5dfa0;text-shadow:0 0 8px #c8952a,0 0 20px #e8c97a;white-space:nowrap;letter-spacing:.05em}@keyframes wobble{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-3deg) scale(1)}50%{transform:rotate(3deg) scale(1.04)}}@keyframes sway{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-8deg)}50%{transform:rotate(8deg)}}@keyframes blink{0%,90%,100%{transform:scaleY(1)}95%{transform:scaleY(.1)}}
